items.name: Can read Japanese
items.note: Comfortable with hiragana, katakana, and basic kanji

items.name: Ear Rumbling
items.note: Voluntary tensor tympani muscle contraction — a rare ability

items.name: Sympathetic System Control
items.note: Can consciously trigger goosebumps on demand

items.name: Body Awareness & Blood Flow Focus
items.note: Ability to focus attention and feel blood flow in specific body parts

items.name: Ear & Nose Movement
items.note: Voluntary independent movement of ears and nose

items.name: Tongue Heart
items.note: Can form a heart shape with the tongue and expand/collapse it
